calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-30-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Miller, Respondent/Plaintiff, appearing in propria persona, Greg Haynes, Esq., for and with Appellant/Defendant Marilou Samson. Respondent/Plaintiff Makela Brown is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are affirmed.

Mr. Haynes requests to dismiss the action as it relates to Respondent/Plaintiff Makela Brown for failure to appear.

Respondent/Plaintiff Caitlin Miller testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibit is introduced:
Exhibit 100 - binder with letters, lease, emails and photos

Mr. Haynes presents arguments on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Marilou Samson, who also testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibits are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - 18 pages of photos and craig's list posting
Exhibit 2 - 3 pages of photos
Exhibit 3 - 6 pages of emails
Exhibit 4 - photo
Exhibit 5 - photo

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-01-2015 Continued To Jul-10-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
